programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Tonight on an all new Ridiculousness, the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer/songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow "Aisle Trolls", be misunderstood while "Speaking Leonese"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, reality star Tami Roman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about her extreme case of RATNAPHOBIA, what it means to be STREET DUMB, and about living with BUTT REGRET.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the fierce LAWN WARRIORS, learn some wisdom in SPEAK YOUR MIND and witness some FURRY FURY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 723
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12

programme.title: Moving Day

programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: Perfect Family

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.desc: While helping Cass handle a spirited horse, Amy learns there is more riding on their success than she realized

programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home.

programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a copycat of the Black Dahlia case. DC Anna Travis follows a trail of chilling clues to a powerful suspect, but can she prove it before he strikes again?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: DI Anna Travis returns, investigating the murder of ex-cop Frank Brandon. As secrets unravel, an autistic witness may hold the key to exposing a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Passed over for promotion, Langton leads the case of star Amanda Delany's murder. A crucifix, silent screams and a second death point to dark secrets in her past, and a killer still close.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Travis joins Alan Daniels on a date and grows more convinced of his innocence, but is it just another performance? And could he still have more of his story to reveal?

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ricky and Jess are reeling from Mario’s revelations and there’s an awkward showdown with the Wrights. James asks Sam to a day at the races. Bobby, Charlie and Gemma hit Essex Pride, and could there be family troubles brewing for Ferne and Charlie…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s Chloe’s first day of work experience at Essex Style Magazine. Ricky tries to rekindle the romance with Jess - but will he succeed? Mario and Lucy go head to head over Bentley.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey and the boys take to the tennis courts, Ricky tries to make a mend with the Wright family over a game of golf. Sam organizes a slap-up dinner at which Lucy discovers Dan is not as squeaky clean.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode of the current series, there has been a Murder in Essex and Abi is planning a Murder Mystery Birthday party. Jess has organized a single ladies 'hen again' party for mum Carol.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the final episode of the current series it's a glorious day for an Essex Wedding as Carol and Mark Wright celebrate their 30th anniversary by renewing their wedding vows. Lucy and Mario have a heart-to-heart.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A reality drama based on the gorgeous and glamorous characters that live it large in Essex. Tonight ….. Will Kirk go through with his tattoo? Will Mark turn up for Lauren’s birthday party?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness the fall out from Lauren’s party. How will Mark’s speed dating event turn out? Will Amy get to live the dream and become a top model? Can Kirk woo Amy and get the girl?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode, will Kirk’s special date for Amy seal their romance? How does Mark cope when temptation and jealousy enter the frame?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arg prepares for his performance at the 1960’s themed party but is thrown to hear that Lydia will be making an appearance

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Essex Fashion Week arrives, but who will win the prize for being the most glamorous Essex girl. Sam? Amy? Jessica?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On this episode of The Only Way Is Essex it’s VIP night at the opening of Mark’s new club

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode of the Only Way Is Essex, follow the tears, the tantrums and the triumphs of Amy, Mark, Sam, Kirk and Jessica.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: What will happen to the resdients of Essex in this episode?? Suffice to say there is drama and excitement on the cards for everyone…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Tonight on The Only Way Is Essex it’s firework night. But who’ll be causing them? Will it be Mark and Lauren? Or Amy and Kirk?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In this episode, will Nanny Pat like her makeover? Can Lauren accept her boss’s offer? Will sparks fly on Amy’s date? And can LOLA give the performance to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this last episode of the Only Way Is Essex, all roads lead to Romford for the big showdown. Yes it’s Mark’s boxing event and he’s thrown down the gauntlet to Kirk.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1005
programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1101
programme.desc: The Geordies are back and buzzin' as big boss Anna sends them off to Greece! Holly and Kyle kick off, while Gaz and Charlotte find themselves in a very awkward situation. (S11, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1102
programme.desc: Big boss Anna sends the guys to their new home in Crete. Chloe wants to know where she stands with Scott. Charlotte and Marnie have some explaining to do after their first night in Malia. (S11, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1103
programme.desc: Gaz's pulling competition causes a bust up for Aaron and Scott. Charlotte tells Holly some home truths about Kyle while the toga party sees Chloe and Scott get closer than ever. (S11, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104
programme.desc: Chloe causes carnage at the boat party while Kyle comes to a big decision over Holly. Marnie sees Kyle at the club and the simmering tensions boil over and it all kicks off. (S11, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1106
programme.desc: Kyle and Hollys' split continues to divide the boys and girls. Scott upsets Chloe, Holly confronts Kyle while Charlotte goes to extraordinary lengths in search of a kebab. (S11, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1107
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1108
programme.desc: After his dramatic exit, the Geordies come to terms with life after Kyle. Chloe's plan to make Scott jealous backfires and Charlotte gives Holly some very tough love. (S11, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1109
programme.desc: Chloe confronts Scott and lets slip how she truly feels. Meanwhile, Marnie gets an unexpected call while Nathan has some big news for the family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1110
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1201
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1202
programme.desc: Charlotte finally turns up with some bunnies and some bigger news for Gaz. Will Holly share her secret? Aaron and Scott's dates with Chantelle end badly as the lads and Chloe all kick off. (S12, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: While one couple reaches a crossroads in their relationship, another couple makes it official. The roommates say goodbye to another summer at the Jersey Shore. Series 3, Episode 13.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: Snooki and Vinny define their relationship; JWOWW tells us how she really feels about Roger; Deena clears up some rumours and Sammi and Ronnie talk about why they just couldn't make it work.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 400
programme.desc: An entertaining look back at the first three seasons of Jersey Shore - complete with all the comedy, drama, mischievous antics, and water cooler moments that keep people talking.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: The housemates pack up their hair extensions & Shore Store t-shirts & jet off for an Italian adventure. But the culture-shock that awaits is nothing compared to their shocking new hook-ups. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: Deena & Pauly consider the consequences should they hook up. The Situation tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. Ron & Sammi try to be friends but old habits die hard. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104

programme.desc: A schoolyard plot ends in murder and teenage passion explodes in a bloody rampage.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 7

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With the help of an undercover source, the DEA's Special Operation Division launches an international manhunt.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 4

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This is the shocking story of Julie Paterson’s tragic murder and the gruesome details of the attack which shocked the local community and drove her partner to drastic measures.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: President George W. Bush and the Joint Special Operations Command prioritise stopping violent Al-Qaida leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 2

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 7

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The NSA and FBI work together to thwart an Al-Qaeda terrorist plot to blow up the New York City subway on the anniversary of 911.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 9

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A mother and her two children were found in their house brutally bashed to death.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A sophisticated terrorist organization of white supremacists attacks the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Convicted killer Jodi Arias whose case triggered a flood of public involvement and social media activity, this past April, Arias was sentenced to life in prison without parole.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 6

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When the battered body of Darryl Lewis is found dumped outside an ambulance station, police began an investigation that would become one of the longest running in Queensland history.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 42
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 1

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 48
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce  with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 41
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 119
programme.desc: Etna, New Hampshire is a small town. It's the kind of place where people trust their neighbors and leave their doors unlocked. A double murder shattered that trust and left the entire community terrified.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 96
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a brutal killer turned a rural area into his personal hunting ground. He preyed on the defenseless, the weak and the elderly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 84
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 77

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 14

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 31

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Fukushima: Robots in Hell

programme.title: Boeing 737 Max: What Went Wrong?
programme.desc: How did the fastest-selling aircraft in Boeing's history, the Boeing 737 MAX, end its run in two tragedies?

programme.title: Tsunami
programme.desc: Tsunamis pose an invisible threat until landfall. Scientists aim to save lives by studying their impact.

programme.title: Lightning

programme.title: Quandaries in Engineering
programme.desc: Floods are a growing threat to our planet, posing engineering and technological challenges to mega-cities.

programme.title: Urban Resilience
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the notion of urban resilience, visiting trailblazer cities around the world.

programme.title: Undermining the Nazis: Paris' Secret Tunnels
programme.desc: Two men show extraordinary courage by secretly mapping Paris' underground during the 1940 German occupation.

programme.title: The Presidents: Clinton
programme.desc: Explore Clinton's transformative, controversial presidency. Learn about his upbringing and public career.

programme.title: Navy Heroes of Normandy

programme.title: Battle of the Alps - 1940

programme.title: Battle of the Bulge - 1944
programme.desc: December 1944, Northern France was the scene of one of the bloodiest battles of World War II.

programme.title: Bleriot
programme.desc: This is one of only two remaining examples of the monoplane built by Louis Bleriot.

programme.title: Lysander

programme.title: Spitfire
programme.desc: Take a look at a beautifully restored example of the later fighter-plane flown by Czech refugee pilots.

programme.title: Swimming in Auschwitz

programme.title: Chiloé: Enchanted Archipelago
programme.desc: The archipelago of Chiloé is where a mix of European and indigenous people created a unique cultural setting.

programme.desc: Only one attempt to assassinate Hitler might actually have succeeded: the secret Operation Foxley was it.

programme.desc: In pristine waters, in one of the most remote locations on earth, lives a mysterious species of shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 15

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been recruited to help with a research project in Australia. He has the hard part of the project, lassoing reef sharks by the tail.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: While on the job at an Florida golf club, an experienced golf ball diver is attacked by a territorial, 400-pound alligator. Jeff Tanswell's snorkeling trip turns into a bloody battle for his life when he is dragged under by an 12-foot saltwater crocodile.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Meet Ian Gordon, one of the world’s leading shark specialists, and encounter nature's most notorious shark, the ultimate predator: the Great White.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ian finds a population of Pelagic Threshers performing strange behaviors. He'll dive with one of the world’s rarest sharks to get to the bottom of it.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Until remote cameras were invented, no one had ever seen the prickly shark. Shark Gordon is hot on the scene to check out these mysterious sharks.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Oceanic White Tip is one of the only sharks that makes Ian Gordon nervous. They prey on whatever they can find, including shipwrecked humans.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: While hiking through Montana's Glacier National Park, Johan and Jenna Otter are attacked by a raging grizzly intent on protecting her cubs. In a remote British Columbia nature park, Patti and Kelly McConnell are mauled by a hungry 400-pound black bear.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The New Zealand sea lion is more than just the most endangered sea lion on Earth.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shark Gordon is called upon to do something that has never been accomplished successfully: to tag a fully grown whale shark. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is believed that sharks mistake humans for other fish, but can sharks really not tell the difference? Shark Gordon intends to find out.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: At about three feet long, the Port Jackson shark is not one of the most dangerous. Ian Gordon is on a mission to observe them during breeding season.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 616
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are playing with their friend Zeg when he accidentally gets blasted by a geyser into a far away mud pit. It’s up to Blaze and AJ to save him, and they must use engineering design inspired by their new dinosaur-truck-friends.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The Umi City Toy Store: Milli, Geo and Bot meet up with their friend Colin at the Umi City Toy Shop. Colin is going to buy a quite extraordinary stuffed toy dog - but then a monkey arrives.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Blaze, Starla, and Darington can’t wait to play every animal’s favorite sport: Jungle Ball! But when their teammate Tooks the Toucan gets launched from the stadium, it’s up to the friends to get her back in the game.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: Geo has a new pet - a seahorse! Coincidentally, there's a problem at the Umi City Aquarium, where there's a big crack in the seahorse tank. Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Samira tells the girls the story of how she and Zeta first met – and how they were once best friends. / The girls must stop Zeta when she takes a scepter that gives her the power to grow magical vines and gems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s Christmas Eve, and Blaze and AJ are helping Santa load his magic bag of presents to deliver all over the world. But Crusher accidently knocks over the bag and sends the presents flying.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher discover a medieval kingdom holding a Royal Race! The two trucks become knights to compete in the race across the realm. But even though Sir Blaze is the speediest knight of all, Crusher's cheats won't make it easy to win.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find a lovable little space creature named Winky. He came to visit with his family, our Purple Planet friends. But, uh oh, he's lost. We have to get Baby Winky back to his family before their spaceship takes off!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a mystery bandit makes off with Blaze's trophy, he'll need to track down the culprit, all while learning about magnets.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Zac uses a wish to bring his dog Rocket to Zahramay Falls – but the genies mistake him for a monster. / After using magic to make Zac forget who he is, Zeta trains him as her apprentice and tries teaching him potions.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Piggy 500, and Starla is excited to race with her prize pig, Zippy, in a team race. But when her competitor Crusher and his rude pig, Slop, cheat and send Zippy far away, it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Starla to find him.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are on Animal Island when they discover a world of tiny creatures right under their tires: Insect City! The friends transform into a super-strong ant and a bouncy grasshopper for their littlest big adventure yet!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to make it to the finish line. Part 2

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: When the magical ladybugs escape from Samira's palace, the girls must get them back before Zeta cause trouble with them. When Zeta loses faith in her sorcery abilities, Shimmer, Shine and Leah help her search for something else she'd be good at.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Today is the Umi City Kite Festival and Jeannie can't wait to fly her beautiful dragon kite. Suddenly, a big gust of wind blows the kite's pieces far and wide throughout Umi City.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call – Blaze’s friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck’s baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It’s up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Zeg has a ticket to ride a brand new dinosaur roller coaster: the Dinocoaster! But when the ticket blows away, it’s up to Blaze to help his buddy track it down and get back to the amusement park in time.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Incredible Presto: The Amazing Presto's big magic show is today. But when Presto takes the team backstage, one of his tricks goes wrong, sending Presto to a farm, trapping him in a watermelon!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the girls accidentally cause Nazboo to inflate like a balloon, Zeta must help them reverse the spell. A sneezing bug buzzes through Zahramay Falls, causing all the genies to create hilarious magic when they sneeze.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah travel to a magical new land called Zahramay Skies and meet Adara, the Stardust Princess. But when Zeta shows up and lets all of Adara's stars loose, the girls must work together to retrieve the stars and save Zahramay Skies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls partake in a Zahracorn Race. Zeta and Nazboo enter with a tiny, speedy Zahracorn named Tickles. The girls take Adara's Zahracorn to the salon, but must track her down when she gets spooked by all the salon magic.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Jake calls in from his class trip at the Umi City Carnival. The class is having a great time on the rides, but Jake has lost his favourite stuffed animal Bunny! Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 2.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Leah and Zac want to twirl, leap, and reenact their new favorite ballet, Swan Lake. Leah wishes to be a ballerina like the Swan Queen, but the genies mistakenly make her a queen of real swans!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. (Spongebob, Patrick, and Squidward's prehistoric alter-egos.)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 78
programme.desc: SpongeBob hears that a ferocious biker gang is coming to town, so SpongeBob prepares to protect the town all by himself./A new Kelp Smoothy chain is opening up all over Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty that he refused to throw away./SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing! And worst of all, Pat may have been the one that stole it./Rejected yet again by Squidward, SpongeBob decides that if he can't hang with the real Squid, he'll make his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs aims to squeeze every penny out of kids on summer break by building a playground in the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob and Patrick lure Squidward to their backyard campout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 80
programme.desc: SpongeBob is going to have the best day ever. But when work, karate, jellyfishing, and Squidward's clarinet recital don't go as planned will his day be ruined?/ It's Best Friends Day so Patrick and SpongeBob trade presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Spongebob desperately searches for his missing name tag./Plankton enlists his relatives to help him steal the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for longer than anyone can remember. But one day, Mr. Krabs reveals that they were not always this way. There was a time when the two rivals were best friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: SpongeBob is jellyfishing when he wistfully realizes that he wants to fly./Patchy the Pirate is set to present a never before seen episode of Spongebob with one problem - no tape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's old fry cook pays a special visit to the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob is in awe of his predecessor, who has since become a world-renowned chef./Tales of the boogeyman send SpongeBob into a panic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 60
programme.desc: SpongeBob catches someone littering and turns him in - but it's the Tattletale Strangler!/SpongeBob and Patrick invest in some magic "invisible spray" at the local prank shop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 83
programme.desc: We check on Patrick's morning routine in 'Rise and Shine', SpongeBob must be patient for his cereal-based entertainment in 'Waiting', and then in 'Fungus Among Us', SpongeBob develops a case of Ick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 61
programme.desc: With the Krusty Krab's new "open 24 hours" policy, the employees must work 'round the clock./Mr. Krabs loses his shell right before a big reunion with his old buddies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 84
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is determined to uncover Plankton's next devious plot in 'Spy Buddies', we learn advanced boating techniques in 'Boat Smarts', and Mr Krabs holds a competition in 'Good Old Whatshisname'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Plankton slips and falls on some water at the Krusty Krab and sues Mr. Krabs for not posting a wet floor sign./Spongebob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress to help him sleep better.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 85
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab (so that he'll never be late again) in 'New Digs', and then in 'Krabs A La Mode', Plankton has an idea to cause some chilly trouble for Mr Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: While trying to beat a world record, SpongeBob forgets to feed Gary - for several weeks. So Gary runs away to downtown Bikini Bottom where he is taken in by a kind old woman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 86
programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park in 'Roller Cowards', then in 'Bucket Sweet Bucket', Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 87
programme.desc: SpongeBob has trouble saying goodbye to the most perfect Krabby Patty he has ever cooked up in 'To Love A Patty', and then in 'Breath of Fresh Squidward', Squidward becomes the most jovial Squid ever!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Squidward's lazy Sunday is constantly interrupted by Spongebob and Patrick's Good Neighbor Club activities./Squidward becomes obsessed with winning a prize from the Skill Crane.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells the Krusty Krab to a conglomerate and explores the joys of retirement./Squidward tricks his neighbor into believing that Spongebob has a laugh-related illness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 66
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: SpongeBob sets out to make his own Mermaid Man movie using the original actors, fresh from the retirement home./Mr. Krabs is horrified to learn Plankton is dating his mother!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Patrick gets hit in the head and comes to with superior intellect!/Sandy accidentally melds Spongebob and Squidward into one body when her teleportation device malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.desc: In another one of his money-making schemes, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into an upscale hotel./Mrs. Puff gets fired when the higher-ups learn of Spongebob's repeated failure.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 17
