programme.desc: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/Cat-astrophe: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Arnold -- in his guise as the Great Arnoldini -- gives an amateur magic show behind the boarding house and, for his big number, makes Helga disappear./ Arnold accidentally beats Harold in a baseball game. The bully vows to "kill" Arnold.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Stinky Goes Hollywood/Olga Gets Engaged: Stinky's simple life changes after he becomes the surprise new spokesman for Ya-Hoo Soda. Olga brings home her surprise fiancé who wins over everyone except Helga.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are going to have a baby! And, in typical fairy fashion, it's Cosmo having the baby, not Wanda!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Despite Timmy's strong warning, Chloe wishes the allegedly "dangerous" class bunny was free. Chloe resorts to stealing when Timmy's Dad buys the only Kale Patch Kid she needs to complete her collection.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Feeling his natural beaver defenses are weak, Dag relentlessly attempts to learn new methods of self defense.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 52
programme.desc: Best Man/Cool Party: The Coach wants to remarry Tish and asks Arnold to be his best man./ Rhonda has a party and only invites the cool kids.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Big Gino/Jamie O in Luv: Sid gets in over his head when doing business with the local kid loan shark, Big Gino. When Big Gino forces Sid to work for him, Arnold tries to save Sid from getting into more trouble but turns Big Gino against him.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Otto gets jealous when Tito's nephew Keoni comes for a visit from Hawaii. Not only is Keoni an instant hit with the gang, he seems to be able to do everything better than Otto.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When Timmy has to take the trash out, he's done what any kid with fairies would do - he simply wishes it away. Timmy has become the unknowing subject of Fairy World's most popular Reality TV series, "Timmy TV."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Anti-Poof: For every fairy, there’s an anti-fairy – thus anti-Poof is born – FOOP! It’s up to Poof to stop this anti-fairy from destroying Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Scary GodCouple: Foop becomes Vicky’s anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Hall Monitor/Harold's Bar Mitzvah: When it's time for Helga to step down as Hall Monitor, Helga chooses Phoebe as her replacement. Helga assumes that Phoebe will let Helga maintain the extra perks which come with the assignment.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Bored Identity/Country Clubbed: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad’s life was like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Rain keeps Reggie from training for the Triathlon, so she joins in some kitchen-destroying mayhem with Otto. Tired of Reggie's bossy attitude, Twister and Otto make fun of her when she wipes out.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mission: Responsible/Hair-i-cane: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted from taking care of their baby, so Timmy volunteers to take over and give them a night out on the town./Timmy wishes up indestructible hair with personality that can never be cut!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Steely Phil/Quantity Time: Arnold trains Grandpa to take on his old Chinese checkers nemesis, Robby Fisher. Miriam decides to visit her mother after learning that Big Bob and Helga are on vacation at the same time.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Arnold becomes a hot (and dangerous) hitter. He keeps injuring people every time he swings the bat. Afraid of hurting more people, Arnold refuses to play ball. / Arnold and Gerald manage the career of the unlikely country-and-western singer, Mr. Hyunh.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: King Chang/The End of the Universe-ity: Shya! Mark Chang is called back to Yugopotamia to become king while his father, under attack from a mystery assailant, flees for his life. Dark Laser’s back and tries to make Timmy his apprentice!

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Counting on the natural beaver reflex to dam running water, the government air-drops Norb and Dag into a flood zone.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Otto and Twister look down on boogie boarding, so Sam feels left out of the group. The other kids blame Sam for giving them the flu and keeping them from playing a crucial street hockey game.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts!/Timmy makes magic "You Doo" dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Full Moon/Ms. Pataki, Student-Teacher: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it''s a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. The gang all worry that Arnold will snitch.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: TV's Adam West, star of the superhero series "Catman," never had a real childhood. Timmy wishes that Adam could become a kid again. / Timmy wishes Cosmo and Wanda were Tootie's birthday fairies for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lame Ducks/Perfect Nightmare: Dad organizes a neighborhood watch program to catch a neighborhood thief. Timmy wishes he had the perfect family in order to win a contest. Everyone goes crazy trying to be perfect.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. / When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The guys are visited by their hometown friend who happens to be an awesome singer, but also the world’s biggest klutz! At the same time, James is visited by a fan whose behavior quickly turns from complimentary to stalker.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In our season finale, Drake and Josh go on the Dr. Phyliss Show and relive some of their most outlandish moments. Some will jab at your funny bone, while others will tug on your heart strings.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Lost Jacket, Falling Pigeons: When Dub gives the girls bonuses for Sky Whale's success, Babe buys herself a fancy new jacket. But she is crushed when she loses it. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: Shark Explosion: Triple G's mom Jackie invites the kids on her yacht. But she and Double G have doubled booked the yacht, causing the pair to compete for the kids' affection. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: James' mom, nicknamed the "Estee Lauder of the Midwest" for her successful cosmetics line, arrives at the Palm Woods to bring James home and groom him to take over the family company.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's Aunt Catherine's wedding day, and Drake and Josh are in charge of picking up the cake. But their wedding plans get crashed when their car breaks down.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: After Bellview High nerd, Eric Blonnowitz accidentally punches Drake he finds a newfound world of fame, popularity and girls.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After Drake agrees to help Josh with his girl troubles, Josh finds himself promising to play a birthday song at his crush's party.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: While Gustavo struggles to write the band's next hit song, the guys try to cheer up Kendall, who is heartbroken after his break-up with Jo.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Lucy, an 18-year-old rocker chick moves into the Palm Woods and she immediately blows the BTR guys away by how cool she is. Carlos and James are desperate to date Lucy, while Kendall tries to prove that BTR can rock too.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 116
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are nominated for a Girl Power Award. Kenzie soon realises the award show is a scam, but Babe is determined to win her first trophy ever.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie work to convince Double G to partner with them in their new venture while Triple G works to convince the girls to let him join the team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blessed with his unconventional dance moves, Josh decides to try out for the local dance contest.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kendall and Lucy are about to have their first kiss when her good looking ex-boyfriend Beau shows up to win her back. Griffin recruits Logan and Carlos to help him prepare for corporate espionage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: When the kids discover a hacker has put their new game Nasty Goats on an illegal website, they track him down in Alaska. With the help of Double G, they strike a deal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Dub's recently announced bid for mayor gets off to a rocky start after he snubs a newborn, so the Game Shakers step up to help him get over his fear of babies and end "Babygate" once and for all.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake has taken advantage of Josh for the last time and Josh decides that he is done dealing with Drake.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: James' fairy tale romance with a foreign princess quickly becomes an escape mission after he inadvertently proposes marriage, and the guys have to free him before he's forced into a royal wedding.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: The Game Shakers take the subway to a boxing game pitch, but forget the gloves and send Trip and Hudson back for them. Dub goes to save Trip from the subway.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake bets that he can last longer without junk food than Josh can without video games. Who will win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's BTR's final stop on their world tour and we go behind the scenes and see all the craziness that happens backstage. Mixing in real concert footage, we see the guys prepare for the show and deal with backstage drama.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Big Time Dreams Pt. 1: It’s the Tween Choice Awards, and BTR is nominated and booked to close the show! However, their night is in jeopardy when the guys uncover an evil plan to brainwash the audience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: To settle a dispute over who Freddie liked better in iCarly - Carly or Sam - the Game Shakers track down Nathan Kress himself and try to get the answer out of him by any means necessary.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fueled by a love of the opposite sex and fear of commitment, Drake breaks up with his girlfriend only to realize that he may have made the wrong decision.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys are continuing to live their Hollywood dream, however James, Logan & Carlos begin showing odd behavior.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: After learning that the exact same game idea they're about to pitch to a client was already released by another company, the Game Shakers have twenty minutes to think up a new game.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: When Gustavo announces that the boys get to make their first music video, they go overboard and over promise roles to all the kids at the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Drake takes advantage of Josh's billiard skills by hustling local kids and swindling them out of their money.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: James helps Camille run lines for an audition and they end up kissing! Meanwhile, Gustavo tries to set up Carlos with his first girlfriend, and Kendall and Jo try to balance their hectic schedules so they can see each other.
